name: [Black Mesa Resonance Cascade RP!]
description:
The Black Mesa Research Facility, or B.M.R.F. for short, and colloquially known as Black Mesa, was a scientific research complex built around an abandoned Cold War ICBM launch silo in the New Mexico desert in the United States. The site was the location of the Black Mesa Incident, the result of a resonance cascade which would have catastrophic ramifications upon the planet for years to come. The facility was eventually destroyed by the Mark IV Thermonuclear Device shortly after the cascade.







[Note: Most information is taken and slightly edited from the Half-Life Fandom Wiki or other online sources. Apologies as it probably isn't good, I just thought that this would be fun.]
creator: LouLaBug
